---
title: "Solution 04 — Tests Nextflow avec nf-test"
format: html
toc: true
---

## Solution — Test de process

```groovy
nextflow_process {
    name "Test FASTQC"
    script "modules/fastqc.nf"
    process "FASTQC"

    test("reads valides → HTML produit") {
        when {
            process {
                input[0] = [
                    [id: "sample1", single_end: true],
                    file("${projectDir}/../../data/sample.fastq")
                ]
            }
        }
        then {
            assert process.success
            assert process.out.html.size() == 1
            assert process.out.html[0][1] ==~ /.*sample1.*\.html/
            assert snapshot(process.out).match()
        }
    }

    test("reads vides → process échoue") {
        when {
            process {
                input[0] = [
                    [id: "empty", single_end: true],
                    file("${projectDir}/../../data/empty.fastq")
                ]
            }
        }
        then {
            assert process.failed
        }
    }
}
```

## Solution — Test de workflow

```groovy
nextflow_workflow {
    name "Test QC_TRIM"
    script "workflows/qc_trim.nf"
    workflow "QC_TRIM"

    test("pipeline complet → rapport et reads trimés produits") {
        when {
            workflow {
                input[0] = Channel.of([
                    [id: "sample1", single_end: true],
                    file("${projectDir}/../../data/sample.fastq")
                ])
            }
        }
        then {
            assert workflow.success
            assert workflow.out.html.size() == 1
            assert workflow.out.reads.size() == 1
            assert snapshot(
                workflow.out.html,
                workflow.out.reads
            ).match()
        }
    }
}
```

## Points clés

- `process.success` / `process.failed` — état du process
- `process.out.channel_name` — accès aux sorties par nom
- `process.out.channel[0][1]` — [tuple_index][file_index]
- `snapshot(...).match()` — comparaison par hash SHA256
- `${projectDir}` — chemin racine du pipeline (défini par nf-test)

## Gestion des snapshots

```bash
# Créer / mettre à jour
nf-test test --update-snapshot

# Les snapshots sont dans :
tests/snapshots/fastqc.nf.test/
```

## Pattern nf-core : test profile

Le pipeline exemple inclut un profil `test` dans `nextflow.config` :

```bash
nextflow run main.nf -profile test
```

C'est ce profil que la CI utilise. Il pointe sur les mêmes mini-données.
